'''âw-h-th''' ('''kawahath''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lysylate|lysylate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-h-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lysylate|lysylate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âw-h-th
|-
! Lemma
| kawahath
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwahath|thiwahath]] || [[word:jiwahath|jiwahath]] || [[word:shiwahath|shiwahath]] || [[word:kiwahath|kiwahath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuwahath|thuthuwahath]] || [[word:jujuwahath|jujuwahath]] || [[word:shushuwahath|shushuwahath]] || [[word:kukuwahath|kukuwahath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuwahath|thuwahath]] || [[word:juwahath|juwahath]] || [[word:shuwahath|shuwahath]] || [[word:kuwahath|kuwahath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuwahath|thuwahath]] || [[word:juwahath|juwahath]] || [[word:shuwahath|shuwahath]] || [[word:kuwahath|kuwahath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thewahath|thewahath]] || [[word:jewahath|jewahath]] || [[word:shewahath|shewahath]] || [[word:kewahath|kewahath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothowahath|thothowahath]] || [[word:jojowahath|jojowahath]] || [[word:shoshowahath|shoshowahath]] || [[word:kokowahath|kokowahath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowahath|thowahath]] || [[word:jowahath|jowahath]] || [[word:showahath|showahath]] || [[word:kowahath|kowahath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowahath|thowahath]] || [[word:jowahath|jowahath]] || [[word:showahath|showahath]] || [[word:kowahath|kowahath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠwahath|thĂŠwahath]] || [[word:jĂŠwahath|jĂŠwahath]] || [[word:shĂŠwahath|shĂŠwahath]] || [[word:kĂŠwahath|kĂŠwahath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathawahath|thathawahath]] || [[word:jajawahath|jajawahath]] || [[word:shashawahath|shashawahath]] || [[word:kakawahath|kakawahath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thawahath|thawahath]] || [[word:jawahath|jawahath]] || [[word:shawahath|shawahath]] || [[word:kawahath|kawahath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thawahath|thawahath]] || [[word:jawahath|jawahath]] || [[word:shawahath|shawahath]] || [[word:kawahath|kawahath]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shawahath|shawahath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshawahath|goshawahath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishawahath|gokishawahath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shawahathnĂŒ|shawahathnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshawahathnknĂŒ|goshawahathnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishawahathnĂŒ|gokishawahathnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shawahathshĂ«|shawahathshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshawahathnkshĂ«|goshawahathnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishawahathshĂ«|gokishawahathshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawahathro|shawahathro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawahathnkro|goshawahathnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawahathro|gokishawahathro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shawahathmu|shawahathmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawahathnkmu|goshawahathnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawahathmu|gokishawahathmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shawahathsher|shawahathsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshawahathnksher|goshawahathnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishawahathsher|gokishawahathsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shawahathng|shawahathng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshawahathnkng|goshawahathnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishawahathng|gokishawahathng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shawahathya|shawahathya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshawahathnkya|goshawahathnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishawahathya|gokishawahathya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shawahathyam|shawahathyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshawahathnkyam|goshawahathnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishawahathyam|gokishawahathyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawahathnĂŒshĂ«|shawahathnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawahathnknĂŒshĂ«|goshawahathnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawahathnĂŒshĂ«|gokishawahathnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawahathnĂŒro|shawahathnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawahathnknĂŒro|goshawahathnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawahathnĂŒro|gokishawahathnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawahathnĂŒmu|shawahathnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawahathnknĂŒmu|goshawahathnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawahathnĂŒmu|gokishawahathnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawahathshĂ«nĂŒ|shawahathshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawahathnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshawahathnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawahathshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishawahathshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawahathshĂ«ro|shawahathshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawahathnkshĂ«ro|goshawahathnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawahathshĂ«ro|gokishawahathshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawahathshĂ«mu|shawahathshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawahathnkshĂ«mu|goshawahathnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawahathshĂ«mu|gokishawahathshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawahathronĂŒ|shawahathronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawahathnkronĂŒ|goshawahathnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawahathronĂŒ|gokishawahathronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawahathroshĂ«|shawahathroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawahathnkroshĂ«|goshawahathnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawahathroshĂ«|gokishawahathroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawahathromu|shawahathromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawahathnkromu|goshawahathnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawahathromu|gokishawahathromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawahathmunĂŒ|shawahathmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawahathnkmunĂŒ|goshawahathnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawahathmunĂŒ|gokishawahathmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawahathmushĂ«|shawahathmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawahathnkmushĂ«|goshawahathnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawahathmushĂ«|gokishawahathmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawahathmuro|shawahathmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawahathnkmuro|goshawahathnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawahathmuro|gokishawahathmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
